# Synthetic Section — Causes of Conflict

SENTINEL_CHUNK_TEXT_VQF2_B: a synthetic sentence restricting the same claim
to a single invented polity.

Fixture for tests/analysis/test_vault_query_facets.py (issue #251). This is
"chunk B": same `source_id` as chunk A (`vqf2-src-north`), so both belong to
`query_by_source("vqf2-src-north")`'s expected result. Its `chunk_id` is also
one of the two ids the fixture artifact's `cited_by` names.
